name: Professor Aronnax
description: Professor Aronnax, rendered in lush watercolor, is a man marked by both intellect and the salty tang of the sea air. His face, a canvas of soft pinks and muted oranges, is dominated by a high forehead etched with fine lines, reflecting years of dedicated study. A neatly trimmed, though slightly unruly, beard of silver-grey flows from his jawline, catching the light in pearly highlights. His nose is long and aquiline, painted with subtle gradations of purple to define its shape. Sharp, intelligent eyes, a deep and unwavering blue, are framed by wire-rimmed spectacles that glint with a touch of gold. He favors practical, yet subtly refined clothing, opting for a high-collared, Prussian blue wool coat, the texture suggested by delicate dry-brush strokes and layered washes. Beneath, a cream-colored cravat adds a touch of scholarly formality. The overall color palette leans towards cool blues, greens, and greys, accented by warmer tones in his skin and the metallic sheen of his spectacles, suggesting a man comfortable in both the academic world and the wild expanse of the ocean.
